description: Single source of truth for FMF hook names (FMF.DOMAIN.Event). Legacy runtime strings may still use FFM.* until migration.

hooks.name: FMF.GAMEPLAY.JobCompleted
hooks.description: Emitted when a job has been fully processed.

hooks.name: FMF.SERVER.RackOverheated
hooks.description: Server rack exceeded a critical temperature threshold.

hooks.name: FMF.EMPLOYEE.Hired
hooks.description: An employee was hired into the roster.

hooks.name: FMF.RACK.PowerLimitExceeded
hooks.description: Power draw or allocation for a rack exceeded configured limits.
